desc: A radar / spider chart generator for multivariate data. Each axis represents a variable. Values are plotted along axes, connected to form a polygon. Overlay multiple series. Support customization: axis labels, value ranges, fill opacity, grid style. Useful for comparing entities on multiple metrics.

title: DAW (Digital Audio Workstation) Lite
desc: A DAW (Digital Audio Workstation) lite. Multi-track recording/playback, waveform display, non-destructive editing (cut, copy, paste, trim), volume/pan automation, effects chain (EQ, compressor, reverb), mix down to WAV file. Piano roll editor for MIDI tracks. VST/AU plugin hosting. Real-time audio processing with low latency.

title: Audio Editor (Audacity-like waveform editing)
desc: An audio editor similar to Audacity. Load WAV/MP3/FLAC files, display waveform. Selection tool for regions, cut/copy/paste/delete, silence insertion, fade in/out. Effects: amplify, normalize, pitch shift, tempo change, reverse. Multi-track mixing. Spectral view (FFT-based).

title: Drum Machine / Step Sequencer
desc: A drum machine / step sequencer. Grid of steps vs sounds (kick, snare, hi-hat, clap, etc.). Each step toggles a sound on/off. BPM controls playback speed. Swing/shuffle timing. Pattern chaining to create songs. Export audio as WAV. Visual metronome.

title: Granular Synthesizer
desc: A granular synthesizer. Load an audio sample, divide into small grains (10-50ms). Parameters: grain size, pitch (playback speed), density (grains per second), position (scan through sample), envelope (attack/release per grain), randomization. Layer multiple grain streams for complex textures.

title: Audio Looper / Phrase Sampler
desc: An audio looper / phrase sampler. Record audio input (mic/line in) into a loop buffer. Play back the loop, overdub new layers on top. Multiple independent loop tracks. Crossfade between loops. Sync loops to BPM. Effects per track: reverb, delay, filter. Export loop set.

title: Auto-Tune / Pitch Correction
desc: Auto-tune / pitch correction. Analyze input audio pitch (using autocorrelation or Cepstrum), quantize detected pitch to nearest semitone in a selected scale, resynthesize with corrected pitch using PSOLA or phase vocoder. Adjustable retune speed (how fast to snap to pitch).

title: Audio Effect Chain (reverb, delay, chorus)
desc: An audio effect chain that applies effects sequentially: reverb (convolution or Schroeder), delay (feedback, ping-pong), chorus (modulated delay), flanger, phaser, distortion (clipping, overdrive, fuzz), compressor (threshold, ratio, attack, release). Load WAV, process through chain, output WAV.

title: Metronome / Instrument Tuner
desc: A metronome / instrument tuner. Metronome: audible click at configurable BPM, time signature (4/4, 3/4, 6/8), accent on first beat. Tuner: capture mic input, detect pitch (FFT peak frequency or autocorrelation), display note name and cents deviation from target. Visual indicator for in-tune.

title: Sheet Music Renderer (MIDI to notation)
desc: A sheet music renderer that converts MIDI files to musical notation. Parse MIDI events, detect key/time signatures, quantize note starts/durations. Render notes on a staff (treble/bass clef, ledger lines, accidentals, rests, ties, beams). Output as PNG/SVG or via music engraving library.

title: Chord Progression Analyzer
desc: A chord progression analyzer. Take a list of chord names (Cmaj7, Dmin7, G7, etc.) and analyze: key detection (by diatonic chords), roman numeral analysis (I, ii, V7, etc.), common progressions (ii-V-I, I-IV-V, etc.), function (tonic, subdominant, dominant). Display analysis with labels.

title: Audio Stream Mixer (multi-track)
desc: An audio stream mixer that mixes multiple input tracks into a single output. Each track has volume, pan, mute/solo controls. Sum samples with floating-point precision to avoid clipping. Apply gain staging. Output mixed stream to file or audio device. Real-time mixing with low latency.

title: Noise Gate / Compressor / Limiter
desc: A noise gate / compressor / limiter. Noise gate: closes (silences) when signal falls below threshold. Compressor: reduces gain when signal exceeds threshold (ratio controls reduction amount, attack/release envelope). Limiter: prevents signal from exceeding a ceiling (brickwall). Visualize gain reduction.

title: LED Matrix Display Driver (text + animations)
desc: An LED matrix display driver (text + animations). Drive an LED matrix (e.g., MAX7219 or WS2812B) from a microcontroller. Display scrolling text, static messages, simple animations (blinking patterns, moving shapes). Show time/date. Support multiple matrix panels tiled together. Control via serial commands.

title: Temperature / Humidity Data Logger
desc: A temperature / humidity data logger. Read from a DHT11/DHT22 or BME280 sensor. Log readings to SD card or send to server via WiFi (ESP32). Timestamp each reading. Display current values on an LCD/OLED screen. Export logged data as CSV. Support configurable logging interval.

title: Smart Home Hub Controller
desc: A smart home hub controller. Central hub that communicates with IoT devices (lights, switches, sensors) via MQTT, Zigbee, Z-Wave, or WiFi. Web/App interface to control devices, create scenes (e.g., 'Good Night' turns off lights, locks door), set schedules, and receive sensor alerts.

title: ESP32 Web Server with REST API
desc: An ESP32 web server with REST API. Run an HTTP server on ESP32 serving a web page and a REST API. Endpoints control GPIO pins (on/off, PWM), read sensor data (temperature, humidity, motion), configure WiFi settings. Serve static files from SPIFFS. OTA firmware update capability.

title: Handheld Game Console (Arduino)
desc: A handheld game console using Arduino (e.g., Arduboy-like). 128x64 OLED display, joystick/buttons, speaker. Implement simple games: Snake, Flappy Bird, platformer, puzzle. Game loop with delta-time, sprite rendering, collision detection, sound effects via buzzer. Battery-powered. Menu system for game selection.

title: Drone Flight Controller (simulation)
desc: A drone flight controller (simulation). Simulate 6-DOF drone physics with PID control loops for stabilization. Implement: attitude estimation (complementary or Kalman filter from gyro/accel/mag), position hold (GPS), altitude hold (barometer), waypoint navigation, and failsafe behavior. Visualize in a 3D simulator.

title: Motion-Activated Security Camera
desc: A motion-activated security camera. Use a PIR motion sensor to detect movement, trigger a camera module (ESP32-CAM or Raspberry Pi camera) to capture image/video. Upload footage to cloud/server with timestamp. Send notification (push/email/SMS). Optionally record to SD card for local backup.

title: RFID / NFC Door Lock System
desc: An RFID / NFC door lock system. Read RFID/NFC tags (MFRC522 or PN532). If tag UID matches authorized list, activate a servo/relay to unlock the door. Log access attempts (time, UID, granted/denied). Admin interface to add/remove authorized tags. Battery-backed RTC for timestamps.

title: Weather Station (sensors + live dashboard)
desc: A weather station with sensors and live dashboard. Measure temperature, humidity, pressure (BME280), wind speed (anemometer), rainfall (tipping bucket). ESP32 sends data via WiFi to a server. Web/mobile dashboard displays current conditions, historical charts (by hour/day/month), and weather alerts.

title: Bluetooth LE Beacon Scanner
desc: A Bluetooth LE beacon scanner. Scan for BLE advertisements (iBeacon, Eddystone). List discovered beacons with UUID, major, minor, RSSI (signal strength), estimated distance. Log beacon appearances and disappearances. Calculate dwell time. Trigger actions when entering/exiting beacon regions.
